title: Tommy Emmanuel - Somewhere Over the Rainbow (Full Lesson)
description:
A complete breakdown of Tommy Emmanuel's arrangement of Somewhere Over the Rainbow. We cover the chord melody approach, right-hand thumb independence, and the signature harmonics in the bridge.

0:00 Intro
2:15 Open position chord shapes
6:30 Thumb bass line independence
11:00 Melody placement on top strings
16:45 Bridge harmonics technique
22:00 Putting it all together
26:30 Slow practice tips
tags: Tommy Emmanuel,fingerstyle guitar,chord melody,harmonics,acoustic guitar lesson,Somewhere Over the Rainbow,guitar tutorial

title: Andy McKee - Drifting Full Tutorial (All Sections)
description:
The definitive lesson on Andy McKee's iconic Drifting. Covers DADGAD tuning setup, two-handed tapping, thumb slaps, and the percussive body hits that make this piece so distinctive.

0:00 Intro and tuning
3:00 DADGAD explained
7:30 Section A - Opening theme
14:00 Two-handed tapping technique
20:30 Section B - Bridge
26:00 Percussive elements breakdown
31:00 Full performance
tags: Andy McKee,Drifting,DADGAD,fingerstyle,two-handed tapping,percussive guitar,acoustic guitar tutorial

title: Bach Cello Suite No. 1 Prelude - Classical Guitar Transcription Tutorial
description:
Working through the Bach Cello Suite No. 1 Prelude in its standard classical guitar transcription. We examine the voice leading, how to bring out the implied harmony, and right-hand fingering choices.

0:00 Historical context
4:00 Key considerations for guitar
9:30 Bars 1-16 slowly
17:00 Bars 17-32
24:00 Arpeggiation and tone production
29:00 Performance tempo walkthrough
tags: Bach,Cello Suite,classical guitar,transcription,prelude,guitar lesson,baroque guitar,voice leading

title: Kaki King - Playing With Pink Noise Live at Bowery Ballroom
description: Full live performance of Kaki King playing With Pink Noise at the Bowery Ballroom, NYC. Features her signature percussive tapping style combined with loop pedal layering. Exceptional camera work showing both hands clearly.
tags: Kaki King,live performance,percussive guitar,loop pedal,fingerstyle,Bowery Ballroom,acoustic guitar

title: Travis Picking Fundamentals - The Complete Beginner to Intermediate Guide
description:
Everything you need to master Travis picking. Starting from the alternating thumb pattern through to syncopated melody placement. The most essential fingerstyle technique for country, folk, and acoustic guitar.

0:00 What is Travis picking
3:00 Right hand position and thumb independence
8:30 Basic pattern in G major
14:00 Adding melody notes
20:00 Syncopation and ghost notes
26:30 Full song examples
tags: Travis picking,fingerstyle,alternating thumb,acoustic guitar,country guitar,folk guitar,guitar technique,beginner fingerstyle

title: DADGAD Tuning - Complete Introduction and First Songs
description:
Getting started with DADGAD, the open modal tuning favored by fingerstyle players for its Celtic and world music resonance. We cover retuning, basic chord shapes, modal drones, and three introductory pieces.

0:00 Why DADGAD
2:30 Retuning safely
5:00 Open string resonance
8:30 Basic chord vocabulary
15:00 First melody - Morning Dew
20:30 Celtic drone riff
25:00 Andy McKee style piece
tags: DADGAD,alternate tuning,fingerstyle,Celtic guitar,modal,open tuning,Andy McKee,acoustic guitar

title: Natural Harmonics vs Artificial Harmonics - Full Guitar Guide
description:
Understanding both types of harmonics and how they are used in advanced fingerstyle playing. Covers natural harmonics at the 12th, 7th, and 5th frets, harp harmonics, and artificial harmonics with the right-hand thumb and index technique used by Tommy Emmanuel and Lenny Breau.

0:00 Intro
2:30 Natural harmonics
9:00 Harp harmonics
15:00 Artificial harmonics (RH technique)
22:00 Combining with melody
27:30 Musical examples
tags: harmonics guitar,natural harmonics,artificial harmonics,harp harmonics,Tommy Emmanuel,Lenny Breau,fingerstyle technique

title: Bach Partita No. 2 Chaconne - Full Guitar Performance Analysis
description:
A detailed performance and analysis of the Chaconne from Bach's Partita No. 2 in D minor, arranged for solo guitar. Running time nearly 15 minutes, this is the Mount Everest of solo guitar repertoire. We break down the structural arches, variation types, and the famous D major section.

0:00 Historical context and structure
8:00 First section - variations 1-10
18:30 D major central section
26:00 Return to D minor
32:00 Final climax and close
tags: Bach,Chaconne,Partita No 2,classical guitar,solo guitar,analysis,D minor,guitar performance

title: Jazz Chord Melody for Acoustic Guitar - Autumn Leaves Complete Lesson
description:
A complete chord melody arrangement of Autumn Leaves for fingerstyle acoustic guitar. Covers the standard Bb jazz chord voicings adapted for open position, walking bass lines within chord melody, and embellishing the head with chromatic approaches.

0:00 Intro
3:30 Standard chord progression review
8:00 Chord melody concept
14:00 Full arrangement part 1
22:00 Full arrangement part 2
28:30 Solo performance
tags: jazz guitar,chord melody,Autumn Leaves,acoustic jazz guitar,fingerstyle jazz,guitar lesson,jazz standards

title: Tommy Emmanuel - Classical Gas Live (Guitar Center Sessions)
description: Tommy Emmanuel performs his legendary arrangement of Classical Gas live at Guitar Center Sessions. This performance showcases his unique blend of country picking, classical technique, and showmanship. Includes interview segment on his influences and practice philosophy.
tags: Tommy Emmanuel,Classical Gas,live performance,Guitar Center Sessions,fingerstyle,CGP,acoustic guitar

title: Percussive Guitar Technique - Body Slaps, Taps and Percussion Fundamentals
description:
The foundational percussive techniques used in modern fingerstyle guitar. Covering thumb slaps on the body, index taps on the soundboard, snare simulation, and how to integrate these with melody playing without losing musical continuity.

0:00 Why percussion in guitar
4:00 Basic thumb slap
9:30 Index finger tap
14:00 Snare simulation on the bridge
18:30 Integrating with melody
24:00 Full percussive piece
tags: percussive guitar,body slap,guitar tapping,fingerstyle technique,acoustic percussion,Andy McKee style,modern fingerstyle

title: Andy McKee - Art of Motion Full Performance
description: Andy McKee performs his full album Art of Motion in a studio session. Featuring Rylynn, Drifting, Hunter's Moon, and Tight Toes among others. A definitive document of modern fingerstyle guitar at its peak.
tags: Andy McKee,Art of Motion,Rylynn,Drifting,fingerstyle,acoustic guitar,DADGAD,full album performance

title: Bach Lute Suite BWV 996 - E Minor Complete Guitar Transcription
description:
The complete E minor Lute Suite BWV 996 performed and analyzed for guitar. Includes Prelude, Allemande, Courante, Sarabande, Bourrée, and Gigue. Discussion of ornamentation choices, right-hand technique, and the challenges of transferring lute idioms to guitar.

29:30 Bourrée
34:00 Gigue

title: Right Hand Technique for Fingerstyle Guitar - PIMA and Beyond
description:
A thorough breakdown of right-hand fingerstyle technique. Covering classical PIMA naming conventions, nail care and shaping, rest stroke vs free stroke, angle of attack for tone production, and how modern acoustic players adapt classical technique.

3:00 PIMA naming and basic assignment
7:30 Rest stroke for melody emphasis
12:00 Free stroke for accompaniment
16:30 Nail shaping and care
22:00 Tone production and angle
27:00 Exercises

title: Jazz Guitar Chord Voicings for Fingerstyle Players - Drop 2 and Drop 3
description:
Practical jazz chord voicings for the acoustic fingerstyle guitarist. Focused on Drop 2 and Drop 3 voicings that work well without a pick, and how to incorporate them into chord melody arrangements and solo jazz guitar playing.

4:00 Drop 2 construction
10:30 Drop 3 construction
16:00 Rootless voicings
21:30 Voice leading between chords
27:00 Full jazz standard application

title: Tommy Emmanuel - Guitar Boogie Live in London
description: Tommy Emmanuel at the Royal Albert Hall performing Guitar Boogie to a standing ovation. This clip has circulated for years as a definitive showcase of alternating thumb technique fused with jazz vocabulary and showmanship. Commentary on technique visible from the camera angle.
tags: Tommy Emmanuel,Guitar Boogie,Royal Albert Hall,live,fingerstyle,alternating thumb,CGP,acoustic guitar

title: Acoustic Guitar Setup for Better Playability - Nut Saddle and Action
description:
A practical guide to understanding and improving acoustic guitar setup. Covers nut slot depth, saddle height, neck relief, and action measurements. Aimed at fingerstyle players who need low action without fret buzz for single-note clarity.

12:00 Nut slots

22:00 Final checks

description:
Exploring the Chet Atkins country fingerpicking style that laid the groundwork for players like Tommy Emmanuel. Covers the muted thumb bass, melody picking with middle and ring, chord fills, and signature licks in the key of G and C.

tags: Kaki King,live performance,percussive guitar,loop pedal,fingerstyle,Bowery Ballroom,acoustic guitar

title: Travis Picking Fundamentals - The Complete Beginner to Intermediate Guide
description:
Everything you need to master Travis picking. Starting from the alternating thumb pattern through to syncopated melody placement. The most essential fingerstyle technique for country, folk, and acoustic guitar.

0:00 What is Travis picking
3:00 Right hand position and thumb independence
8:30 Basic pattern in G major
14:00 Adding melody notes
20:00 Syncopation and ghost notes
26:30 Full song examples
tags: Travis picking,fingerstyle,alternating thumb,acoustic guitar,country guitar,folk guitar,guitar technique,beginner fingerstyle

title: DADGAD Tuning - Complete Introduction and First Songs
description:
Getting started with DADGAD, the open modal tuning favored by fingerstyle players for its Celtic and world music resonance. We cover retuning, basic chord shapes, modal drones, and three introductory pieces.

0:00 Why DADGAD
2:30 Retuning safely
5:00 Open string resonance
8:30 Basic chord vocabulary
15:00 First melody - Morning Dew
20:30 Celtic drone riff
25:00 Andy McKee style piece
tags: DADGAD,alternate tuning,fingerstyle,Celtic guitar,modal,open tuning,Andy McKee,acoustic guitar

title: Natural Harmonics vs Artificial Harmonics - Full Guitar Guide
description:
Understanding both types of harmonics and how they are used in advanced fingerstyle playing. Covers natural harmonics at the 12th, 7th, and 5th frets, harp harmonics, and artificial harmonics with the right-hand thumb and index technique used by Tommy Emmanuel and Lenny Breau.

0:00 Intro
2:30 Natural harmonics
9:00 Harp harmonics
15:00 Artificial harmonics (RH technique)
22:00 Combining with melody
27:30 Musical examples
tags: harmonics guitar,natural harmonics,artificial harmonics,harp harmonics,Tommy Emmanuel,Lenny Breau,fingerstyle technique

title: Bach Partita No. 2 Chaconne - Full Guitar Performance Analysis
description:
A detailed performance and analysis of the Chaconne from Bach's Partita No. 2 in D minor, arranged for solo guitar. Running time nearly 15 minutes, this is the Mount Everest of solo guitar repertoire. We break down the structural arches, variation types, and the famous D major section.

0:00 Historical context and structure
8:00 First section - variations 1-10
18:30 D major central section
26:00 Return to D minor
32:00 Final climax and close
tags: Bach,Chaconne,Partita No 2,classical guitar,solo guitar,analysis,D minor,guitar performance

title: Jazz Chord Melody for Acoustic Guitar - Autumn Leaves Complete Lesson
description:
A complete chord melody arrangement of Autumn Leaves for fingerstyle acoustic guitar. Covers the standard Bb jazz chord voicings adapted for open position, walking bass lines within chord melody, and embellishing the head with chromatic approaches.

0:00 Intro
3:30 Standard chord progression review
8:00 Chord melody concept
14:00 Full arrangement part 1
22:00 Full arrangement part 2
28:30 Solo performance
tags: jazz guitar,chord melody,Autumn Leaves,acoustic jazz guitar,fingerstyle jazz,guitar lesson,jazz standards

title: Tommy Emmanuel - Classical Gas Live (Guitar Center Sessions)
description: Tommy Emmanuel performs his legendary arrangement of Classical Gas live at Guitar Center Sessions. This performance showcases his unique blend of country picking, classical technique, and showmanship. Includes interview segment on his influences and practice philosophy.
tags: Tommy Emmanuel,Classical Gas,live performance,Guitar Center Sessions,fingerstyle,CGP,acoustic guitar

title: Percussive Guitar Technique - Body Slaps, Taps and Percussion Fundamentals
description:
The foundational percussive techniques used in modern fingerstyle guitar. Covering thumb slaps on the body, index taps on the soundboard, snare simulation, and how to integrate these with melody playing without losing musical continuity.

0:00 Why percussion in guitar
4:00 Basic thumb slap
9:30 Index finger tap
14:00 Snare simulation on the bridge
18:30 Integrating with melody
24:00 Full percussive piece
tags: percussive guitar,body slap,guitar tapping,fingerstyle technique,acoustic percussion,Andy McKee style,modern fingerstyle

title: Andy McKee - Art of Motion Full Performance
description: Andy McKee performs his full album Art of Motion in a studio session. Featuring Rylynn, Drifting, Hunter's Moon, and Tight Toes among others. A definitive document of modern fingerstyle guitar at its peak.
tags: Andy McKee,Art of Motion,Rylynn,Drifting,fingerstyle,acoustic guitar,DADGAD,full album performance

title: Bach Lute Suite BWV 996 - E Minor Complete Guitar Transcription
description:
The complete E minor Lute Suite BWV 996 performed and analyzed for guitar. Includes Prelude, Allemande, Courante, Sarabande, Bourrée, and Gigue. Discussion of ornamentation choices, right-hand technique, and the challenges of transferring lute idioms to guitar.

5:00 Prelude

29:30 Bourrée
34:00 Gigue

title: Right Hand Technique for Fingerstyle Guitar - PIMA and Beyond
description:
A thorough breakdown of right-hand fingerstyle technique. Covering classical PIMA naming conventions, nail care and shaping, rest stroke vs free stroke, angle of attack for tone production, and how modern acoustic players adapt classical technique.

3:00 PIMA naming and basic assignment
7:30 Rest stroke for melody emphasis
12:00 Free stroke for accompaniment
16:30 Nail shaping and care
22:00 Tone production and angle
27:00 Exercises

title: Jazz Guitar Chord Voicings for Fingerstyle Players - Drop 2 and Drop 3
description:
Practical jazz chord voicings for the acoustic fingerstyle guitarist. Focused on Drop 2 and Drop 3 voicings that work well without a pick, and how to incorporate them into chord melody arrangements and solo jazz guitar playing.

4:00 Drop 2 construction
10:30 Drop 3 construction
16:00 Rootless voicings
21:30 Voice leading between chords

title: Tommy Emmanuel - Guitar Boogie Live in London

title: Acoustic Guitar Setup for Better Playability - Nut Saddle and Action
description:
A practical guide to understanding and improving acoustic guitar setup. Covers nut slot depth, saddle height, neck relief, and action measurements. Aimed at fingerstyle players who need low action without fret buzz for single-note clarity.

12:00 Nut slots

22:00 Final checks

description:
Exploring the Chet Atkins country fingerpicking style that laid the groundwork for players like Tommy Emmanuel. Covers the muted thumb bass, melody picking with middle and ring, chord fills, and signature licks in the key of G and C.

9:00 Melody on treble strings

title: Bach Partita No. 2 Chaconne - Full Guitar Performance Analysis
description:
A detailed performance and analysis of the Chaconne from Bach's Partita No. 2 in D minor, arranged for solo guitar. Running time nearly 15 minutes, this is the Mount Everest of solo guitar repertoire. We break down the structural arches, variation types, and the famous D major section.

0:00 Historical context and structure
8:00 First section - variations 1-10
18:30 D major central section
26:00 Return to D minor
32:00 Final climax and close
